# Phase 5.5: App 上架准备 & 推送通知 - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-14
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated (autonomous mode — technical decisions at Claude's discretion)

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Complete App store compliance, privacy policy, push notification integration (FCM + APNs), notification templates, user notification preferences, app signing/icons/launch screens, and ASO optimization. Ensures the app can be submitted to App Store and Google Play.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Claude's Discretion
All implementation choices are at Claude's discretion — autonomous mode. Use ROADMAP phase goal, success criteria, and codebase conventions to guide decisions.

### Key Decisions (Auto-Resolved)
- Privacy policy: Generate Chinese-language privacy policy covering data collection, usage, storage, and user rights per PIPL requirements
- Push notifications: Use @react-native-firebase/messaging for FCM + APNs integration
- Notification templates: 4 categories (order, recommendation, community, system) stored in backend config
- ASO: Chinese keywords + English keywords, optimized description for both stores
- App icons/splash: Reference existing design assets if available, otherwise create placeholder specs

</decisions>

<code_context>
## Existing Code Insights

### Reusable Assets
- Existing NestJS backend with module structure
- Existing React Native / Expo mobile app
- Existing notification gateway (notification.gateway.ts from Phase 3)
- Existing user module with preferences support

### Established Patterns
- NestJS modules with service/controller structure
- React Native screens with Zustand stores
- Prisma schema for data models

### Integration Points
- Backend notification gateway (WebSocket)
- User preferences (existing user module)
- Mobile app navigation (existing navigator)

</code_context>
